title: Machine Learning-Guided Optical and Raman Spectroscopy Characterization of 2D Materials
type1_summary: No clearly figure-specific, cleaned, replot-ready source-data files were identified in the inspected set.
type2_summary: The inspected files are dominated by large run-level cycling logs and instrument archives (Cycling, SEM, XPS, XRF), which are consistent with raw or unprocessed data rather than figure-ready source data.
classification_notes: The paper lacks an explicit data availability statement, so file-level evidence dominates. The cycling CSV/XLSX files are clearly raw electrochemical logs. The archive files likely contain additional raw instrument data, but their internal contents were not fully enumerated here. Rule-based prior suggests hidden Type 1 evidence; review recommended.

file_classifications.paper_evidence: The paper does not provide a data availability statement or explicit source-data/figure-data description, so there is no paper-level evidence that this is cleaned source data.
file_classifications.file_evidence: Large archive (97.1 MB) from Zenodo; archive name suggests experimental cycling data. The extracted contents are large run-level CSV/XLSX files with many rows and instrument-style columns, indicating raw or near-raw measurement output.
file_classifications.reasoning: As an archive containing large experimental run files rather than a figure-specific table, it is not directly replot-ready without selecting and processing subsets. This fits raw/unprocessed data.
file_classifications.ambiguity: Moderate: archive-level classification is inferred from contents rather than direct inspection of the ZIP internals.

file_classifications.paper_evidence: No explicit paper statement identifies this as cleaned source data or figure-ready data.
file_classifications.file_evidence: Archive from Zenodo; XPS commonly denotes instrument output or processed spectra. The archive is small (58.1 KB), but the file type is still an archive rather than a directly plottable table.
file_classifications.reasoning: Because the archive contents are not directly shown and the paper gives no source-data indication, the conservative choice is raw/unprocessed or at least not confirmed figure-ready.
file_classifications.ambiguity: High: size is small, so it could contain processed spectra, but there is insufficient evidence to classify as Type 1.

file_classifications.paper_evidence: No explicit paper statement indicates this is source data or figure-ready data.
file_classifications.file_evidence: Large archive (24.1 MB) from Zenodo; SEM typically stores microscopy images or instrument outputs, which are raw image data rather than tabular figure data.
file_classifications.reasoning: Microscopy image archives are not directly replot-ready in the Type 1 sense and usually require image processing or selection for figures.
file_classifications.ambiguity: Low to moderate: the SEM label strongly suggests raw image data, though the archive contents were not individually listed here.

file_classifications.paper_evidence: No explicit paper statement identifies this as cleaned source data.
file_classifications.file_evidence: Small archive (22.1 KB) from Zenodo; XRF typically refers to instrument spectra or elemental analysis output, which may be raw or lightly processed but is not confirmed figure-ready.
file_classifications.reasoning: Without evidence of a figure-specific table or source-data organization, classify conservatively as raw/unprocessed archive data.
file_classifications.ambiguity: High: could contain processed spectra, but there is no direct evidence.

file_classifications.paper_evidence: No paper evidence indicates this is figure/source data; no data availability statement was found.
file_classifications.file_evidence: Very large CSV (100.4 MB, 760,858 rows) with run-level electrochemical cycling columns such as Data_Point, Date_Time, Test_Time(s), Cycle_Index, Current(A), Voltage(V), Capacity, Energy, and resistance metrics.
file_classifications.reasoning: This is clearly instrument/run output rather than a compact figure-ready table. It can be plotted only after substantial filtering/aggregation, so it is raw/unprocessed.
file_classifications.key_columns_or_structure: Data_Point, Date_Time, Test_Time(s), Cycle_Index, Current(A), Voltage(V), Charge_Capacity(Ah), Discharge_Capacity(Ah), Energy, Resistance
